title: Tender Uruguayan Sweetcorn Gratin
description: A mustardy and tender Uruguayan dish featuring sweetcorn, made diabetic-friendly with careful ingredient selection. This cozy gratin is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted butter, whole milk, grated cheddar cheese, dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sweetcorn to the bowl and stir until the corn is well coated with the cheese mixture.
Transfer the sweetcorn mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle the chopped parsley on top.
Let the gratin cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the gratin hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
For a sous-vide option, seal the sweetcorn mixture in a sous-vide bag and cook at 180 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
